top_signals.title: Iran’s Race to Secure New Oil Buyers Won’t Be Easy
top_signals.summary: Tehran has just a couple of months to offer its crude far and wide, and the market dynamics aren’t in its favor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Premarket Movers for June 23, 2026
top_signals.summary: S&P 500 Index futures fall 1.3% as of 7:41 a.m. in New York amid a global selloff in technology stocks.

top_signals.title: Microsoft says Windows 11 26H2 is coming soon, details upgrade process
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has confirmed that Windows 11 version 26H2 will be the next feature update and that devices running Windows 11 24H2 and 25H2 will be able to upgrade using a small enablement package. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
